name: boutique-checkout-consistency-audit
description: Minimal Phase 1 Online Boutique verification flow using deterministic frontend actions, service log checks, and a final LLM audit.

episodes.label: Signal Intake and Scenario Dispatch
episodes.summary: Normalize trigger context and emit execution priors (base URL, namespace, verification contract) before action path execution.
expected_behaviors: product id is discoverable from storefront

episodes.label: Bounded Evidence Collection and Audit
episodes.summary: Execute checkout path, collect service evidence, and route verdict through bounded audit decisions.
expected_behaviors: cart contains selected product after add
cart is cleared after successful checkout
audit node emits structured verdict JSON
route selects finish or human review explicitly

nodes.name: Analyze trigger and dispatch context
nodes.action:
You are a bounded dispatch node for boutique checkout verification. Read trigger context and emit strict JSON for downstream execution priors.

Return JSON keys:
- base_url
- kubectl_namespace
- kubectl_context
- verification_contract
- expected_signals
- confidence

json_defaults.verification_contract: cart_contains_product after add, cart_cleared after checkout, and service logs aligned with page outcome

config.system_prompt: You are a bounded dispatcher. Emit strict JSON only. Do not execute tools.

nodes.name: Check frontend health
nodes.action: BASE_URL='{{dispatch.base_url}}'; if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; fi; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; rm -f "$COOKIE_JAR"; curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/_healthz"

nodes.name: Discover product id
nodes.action: BASE_URL='{{dispatch.base_url}}'; if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; fi; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/" | grep -oE '/product/[A-Z0-9]+' | head -n1 | cut -d/ -f3

nodes.name: Add product to cart
nodes.action: BASE_URL='{{dispatch.base_url}}'; if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; fi; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; curl -sS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" -X POST "$BASE_URL/cart" --data-urlencode "product_id={{discover_product}}" --data-urlencode 'quantity=1' -D - -o /dev/null

nodes.name: Verify cart after add
nodes.action: BASE_URL='{{dispatch.base_url}}'; if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; fi; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; if curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/cart" | grep -q 'SKU #{{discover_product}}'; then echo 'cart_contains_product'; else echo 'cart_missing_product'; fi

nodes.name: Place order
Verify cart after checkout
nodes.action: BASE_URL='{{dispatch.base_url}}'; if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; fi; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; if curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/cart" | grep -q 'Your shopping cart is empty!'; then echo 'cart_cleared'; else echo 'cart_not_empty'; fi

nodes.name: Fetch checkoutservice logs
nodes.action: NS='{{dispatch.kubectl_namespace}}'; if [ -z "$NS" ]; then NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; fi; CTX='{{dispatch.kubectl_context}}'; if [ -z "$CTX" ]; then CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; fi; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/checkoutservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/checkoutservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Fetch paymentservice logs
nodes.action: NS='{{dispatch.kubectl_namespace}}'; if [ -z "$NS" ]; then NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; fi; CTX='{{dispatch.kubectl_context}}'; if [ -z "$CTX" ]; then CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; fi; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/paymentservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/paymentservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Fetch shippingservice logs
nodes.action: NS='{{dispatch.kubectl_namespace}}'; if [ -z "$NS" ]; then NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; fi; CTX='{{dispatch.kubectl_context}}'; if [ -z "$CTX" ]; then CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; fi; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/shippingservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/shippingservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Audit checkout consistency

json_defaults.summary: Audit pending — insufficient evidence to determine outcome.

config.system_prompt: You are a bounded Synapse SOP audit node. You do not execute actions. You only decide whether the checkout flow reached business closure based on the provided action results and service logs. Allowed next_action values are finish and human_review. Choose finish only when checkout evidence is internally consistent. Treat cart_contains_product after add as expected. Treat cart_cleared after checkout as expected. If the cart is not empty after checkout, or if logs and page state disagree, choose human_review unless there is explicit evidence that the cart check itself is invalid.

nodes.name: Request human review
nodes.action: Review Boutique checkout audit inconsistency. Summary: {{audit.summary}}
